opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was just carrying groceries and got this crushing weight on my chest, and it terrifies me because my dad died of a heart attack at my age.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A severe episode of crushing exertional chest tightness while carrying groceries today, only partly settling with rest, in someone whose father died of a heart attack young.

symptom_narrative.onset: a severe episode today while carrying groceries, on a background of recurrent chest tightness over the last two weeks
symptom_narrative.duration: today's episode partly eased after about 20 minutes of sitting but a dull ache remains; milder episodes over the past fortnight
symptom_narrative.character: a crushing, heavy tightness in the centre of the chest, radiating up to the left jaw, with fatigue
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe and frightening - felt like a crushing weight; still has a dull residual ache
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: central chest, spreading up to the left jaw
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: brought on by exertion (carrying groceries); has recurred over two weeks and is becoming more easily provoked
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting and resting partly eased it after about 20 minutes
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: generalised fatigue with the episodes; very anxious; denies fainting
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: recurrent milder chest tightness over the last two weeks, new for him
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally very active and fit; now resting and frightened

family_history_as_reported.narrative: strong family history of very high cholesterol and early heart attacks; his father died of a heart attack young (around his own age now)

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: normally highly active, goes to the gym and prepares healthy meals

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: terrified of dying young like his father; wants to be taken seriously but also frightened of what it means

communication_style.typical_message_style: articulate but frightened; spouse present and anxious
